title: Error reading properties of undefined in Gemini 3 Flash Preview
symptom: When trying to add the `gemini-3-flash-preview`, n8n throws an error about reading properties of undefined. This indicates a potential issue with the model's region support.
not_this_if: Using a different model that is supported
root_cause: The error occurs because the `gemini-3` models only support the `global` region. When a different region is selected, the model fails to initialize properly, leading to the undefined property error.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the Gemini 3 node
Switch the region selection to 'global' using an expression
agent_instruction: Set the region to 'global' in the Gemini 3 node settings using an expression.
